response.justification: Bogdan brings nearly two decades of fullstack experience, comfortably exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS — closely matching the primary stack. His current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly satisfies the unusual AI agent development requirement, and his testing pedigree (TDD practice, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) fits a quality-focused internal tooling team. Gaps are narrow: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly evidenced, and Kotlin/Python are absent from his language list, though his polyglot history suggests these are learnable quickly.
strengths: 19+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work at multiple Berlin companies
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure development in his current role, matching the required AI agent experience
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, both named in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed despite the multi-language proficiency requirement; Java exposure appears dated
Considerable career time in niche ecosystems (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the exact target stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
